sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي النَّاسُ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi provode mnogo vremena na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: People spend a long time on social media sites.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ صُوَرَ الرِّحْلَاتِ وَالْمُنَاسَبَاتِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici dijele fotografije s putovanja i sretnih događaja.
sentences.translationEn: Users share photos of trips and happy occasions.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ فِي الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى اتِّصَالٍ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice pomažu u održavanju kontakta s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: These sites help in staying in touch with friends.
